v0.1.0.description:
## AtlyssArchipelago (fork) — first release

### New

- **XP speed** — Choose how fast you level: from `0.5x` up to `8×`. Default is normal (`1×`). Affects XP from fights and usual in-game rewards (anything the game treats as normal XP).
- **Boss kill checks** — Defeating bosses now properly counts as Archipelago checks. **Six** new boss-related checks in total.

### Changed

- **When to connect** — Connect to Archipelago **after** you’ve loaded into the game with your character. You’ll get a warning if you try too early.
- **Save & Quit** — You’ll be disconnected automatically from the Archipelago server now when you save and quit your character.
- **Chat** — Archipelago messages show in the normal chat area and stay under important UI (like quest lists) so busy servers don’t cover the whole screen.
- **Achievements (YAML / host options)** — You can turn achievement checks **on** or **off** when generating the world. **On (default):** in-game achievements count as Archipelago locations (up to about **18**, fewer if you skip some classes). **Off:** those locations aren’t placed and the mod won’t send achievement checks—good for shorter or more boss/quest-focused runs.
- **Password privacy** — The Archipelago connection password field is masked (hidden characters) like a normal password box.

### Fixes

- Boss-related goals now finish when you kill the right boss.
- Items from Archipelago show up in Spike storage correctly.
- Received items in Spike line up in order without weird gaps.
- Shops show stacked copies of the same AP item, with counters so you know how many you can still buy.
- Fixed a wrong item name so **Slimecrust Katars** send correctly (was misspelled before).

---

*First release of this fork.*
v0.1.0.title: AtlyssArchipelago v0.1.0 (initial fork release)

v0.1.1.description:
### Fixes

- **Universal Tracker** — Generating or refreshing the world for tracking should **not be failing** when the game would otherwise treat your main and secondary class as “the same” during that automated step.
  - **“Can’t generate” / tracker errors** tied to duplicate-looking class defaults during tool-driven generation.

---
v0.1.1.title: Atlyss Archipelago (APWorld) — hotfix: UT generation

v0.2.0.description:
**Requires:** Archipelago **0.6.7+**. Use **apworld and mod both from this same release** — mismatched versions can will break things.

- Mod on Thunderstore under blitz0070: [listing](https://thunderstore.io/c/atlyss/p/blitz0070/AtlyssArchipelago/).

### New

- Crown speed — YAML option for crown income from fights and quests (0.5×–8×). Doesn’t touch shop prices or AP crown items.
- Two progressive portal lines — Sanctum line + separate Tuul line, instead of one “Progressive Portal” item.
- World logic rebuilt — quests, portals, shops, bosses. Better seeds, fill, and tracker/spoiler-log support.
- Gated equipment — gated mode is progressive lines only; unrestricted unchanged.

### Changed

- XP speed — still 0.5×–8×, but only creeps and quests now, not XP tomes.
- Fewer achievement checks — nine by default; removed Trout Master, Fashion Sense, Skill Student, and old class-pick ones. Toggle still works like before.
- Nulversa — three quest checks merged into one.
- Shop Sanity — can’t buy every shop check right at the start anymore; all shop checks open up on receiving `sanctum_catacombs_f2` so normal mode catacombs.
- Shop counters show 0 when sold out.

### Fixes

- Makin’ a Mekspear and other quest routes (including without Crescent Road first).
- Craft quests and wrong Catacombs floors on some quests.
- Gen/fill errors with gated equipment and shop checks.
- Universal Tracker logic export (on top of the v0.1.1 hotfix).
- Altered Vision firing at random times.
- Portals staying wrong after restart.
- “Cresent” → Crescent spelling in logic.
- Misc stability and chat hardening for online play.

### Known Issues
- Can end up with slight hitch / hiccup when receiving items from server. Will hopefully fix in v0.2.1
---
v0.2.0.title: ATLYSS Archipelago — v0.2.0 (Logic Rework)

v0.2.1.description:
**Requires:** Archipelago **0.6.7+**. Modifies only **mod this release** — Can just download this mod to overwrite last release but APworld is the same as last v0.2.0.

### Fixes

- Fixes hitching caused by insane sync on receiving / sending items.
v0.2.1.title: ATLYSS Archipelago — v0.2.1 (Hitching Fix)

v0.2.2.description:
### Fixes

- Refactored underlying Mining & Fishing level code to be Rule Builder based
  - Should fix the previous High Mining Level expectations even though don't have Tuul Enclave Portal problem
- Fixed logic for Sapphite Ingots quest; now doesn't over-complicate and just needs pre-requisite Amberite Ingots finished & Tuul Enclave portal route obtained
- Add in missing quests, Cold Shoulder and Blossom of Life as locations.
- Client: Re-fixed Altered Vision detection; was removed by accident due to other achievement removals
v0.2.2.title: ATLYSS Archipelago — v0.2.2
